gap_rows.detail: none of the target symbol names referenced in retained broader-symbol-pool sources appear in the current local security-master inventory
the branch is source-ready but cannot yet produce a normalized symbol pool from current local coverage

interpretation: V1.34JQ tries to turn the first live same-plane branch into a real broader symbol pool.
It finds that the branch is source-ready but not yet materializable because the current local security-master coverage is too thin to normalize the candidate names carried by retained event sources.
